title: Transfer Switch Sketches | Control Applications
content_html:
Transfer switch controllers - Sketches

Transfer switch controller - 1st generation

Can be identified on the rear panel - connector J5 with 7 clamps

Transfer switch controller - 2nd generation

Can be identified on the rear panel - connector J5 with 6 clamps

Transfer switch controller - 3rd generation

(System with2 breakers)

Can be identified on the front of the device - mode selector

In some models the J2 connector is not present

Transfer switch controller - 3rd generation

(System with3 breakers)

Can be identified on the front of the device - mode selector
